/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/eventcam_stereo.dir/eventcam_stereo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eventcam_stereo.dir/trata_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eventcam_stereo.dir/trata_convcam.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eventcam_stereo.dir/trata_evcam.cpp.o -o eventcam_stereo   -L/opt/spinnaker/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/spinnaker/lib:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libmetavision_sdk_stream.so.5.1.1 -lgpiod /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 -lSpinnaker /usr/local/lib/libmetavision_sdk_core.so.5.1.1 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_timer.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/local/lib/libmetavision_hal_discovery.so.5.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libmetavision_hal.so.5.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libmetavision_sdk_base.so.5.1.1
